nasb.text: But someone will say, “How are the dead raised? And with what kind of body do they come?”

esv.text: But someone will ask, “How are the dead raised? With what kind of body do they come?”

cnv.text: 但有人會說：“死人怎樣復活呢？要帶著怎麼樣的身體來呢？”

ccb.text: 或许有人会问：“死人怎样复活呢？复活后会有怎样的身体呢？”

csbs.text: 但是有人会说：“死人怎样复活呢？他们以什么样的身体出现呢？”
